extension.summary: Fetch TV show metadata from themoviedb.org
extension.description: TMDB TV show scraper with improved artwork handling.
extension.news: v1.0.13 - Simplify artwork scoring, fanart.tv source preference settings, art cache cleanup improvements v1.0.12 - Per-show cache eviction, SQLite artwork cache, fix per-source settings, episode group season artwork v1.0.11 - Remove hardcoded addon ID, fix verbose logging for NfoUrl v1.0.10 - Fix episode group episode ordering in Kodi GUI v1.0.9 - Season-aware artwork selection, fix episode group seasons, fetch image URLs from TMDB config v1.0.8 - Better artwork distribution across all art types, fix episode group from TMDB URLs, fix Fanart.tv URLs with special characters v1.0.7 - Tier-based artwork scoring, prefer highest resolution setting, reorganize settings v1.0.6 - Fix Fanart.tv season art with no number getting assigned to all seasons instead of specials v1.0.5 - Simplify artwork scoring: language + pixels + vote tiebreaker v1.0.4 - Prioritize user-language clearart from Fanart.tv v1.0.3 - Punctuation agnostic title matching, year filter fallback, tweaks to external ID search, fix Fanart.tv cache growth v1.0.2 - Fix search result ordering and broken folder name parsing v1.0.1 - Add more details to manual scrape selection v1.0.0 - Initial release
